---
title: var-naming
description: "Enforce idiomatic identifier naming."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Enforce idiomatic identifier naming. Strider default: common initialisms.

## Bad

```go
var userId string
```

## Good

```go
var userID string
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only var-naming`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
